title: Families of US Scientists Denounce UFO and Nuke Conspiracy Theories, as FBI Deepens Probe on Disappearances
description: A federal investigation is examining the deaths and disappearances of US scientists amid conspiracy theories involving UFOs and espionage, as families call for factual clarity.

title: Preachers told to 'prepare' for UFO files that will make Bible look like 'myth'
description: Pastors claim US intelligence warned them of incoming UFO files featuring 'reptilian' beings that could threaten Christian faith and make the Bible look like a 'myth'

title: Are aliens real? Stephen Colbert presses Barack Obama to ‘just come clean’ on UFO secrets
description: The truth may be out there, but according to former US president, it’s definitely not hiding in a government basement.

title: Dead NASA-linked expert ‘hit by secret Pentagon beam’ after exposing UFO theory as War Dept confirms energy weapons use
description: A DEAD NASA-linked scientist was allegedly blasted by a secret Pentagon "beam" after threatening to expose theories on UFOs and anti-gravity technology. The bombshell claims have resurfaced after the Department of War publicly confirmed it uses futuristic “directed energy weapons” - or DEWs - in military operations. The Department's chief technology officer Emil Michael revealed...

title: Neil deGrasse Tyson Isn't Holding Breath on UFO Files
description: Renowned astrophysicist Neil deGrasse Tyson is happy the US is about to release government files on UFOs, but he also expects to be disappointed. After years of congressional testimony from self-described insiders claiming crashed saucers, alien bodies, and recovered technology, Tyson predicts the files themselves will be "anticlimactic" in a...
